calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Nov-10-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Edward Tredinnick, Esq. (415-981-1400) for Plaintiff/Moving party First Republic Bank.
No other Appearance.

The Court calls lines 8,9, 10 and 17. The Court announces it does not find any reason why a receiver should be appointed. Plaintiff does not contest Line 9 which has a dismissal. Plaintiff Argues Lines 8, 10 and 17. A receiver is needed to collect rent and a non-judical foreclosure. The debtor continued to collect rent and does not service escrow and taxes therefore his client is burdened, Plaintiff cites CCP 564(b)11 and suggests a $10,000 bond. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF FIRST REPUBLIC BANK's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And Temporary Restraining Order is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal filed October 28, 2015.Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar Oct-08-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Edward Tredinnick, Esq. (415-981-1400) of Green Radovsky Maloney Share & Hennigh LLP for Plaintiff/Moving party .
No other Appearance.

The Court calls case numbers 547886, 547887, 547888 and 547889. The Court asks what the necessary notice requirements are. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Plaintiff's Motion for Appointment of Receiver is off calendar. No Proper notice. Party must refile and reserve papers. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
